Author: GameADay
Description: MediaMaid – One-touch media organizer and renamer for Jellyfin, Plex, and content curation. Rename TV shows, movies, music, and photos in seconds.
Name: MediaMaid

Actions.Name: Quick Rename
Actions.Tooltip: Rename files in the configured folder to a chosen media standard (Jellyfin, Photography, Music, etc.).

Actions.Name: Smart Fix
Actions.Tooltip: Automatically detect the media type in the target folder and apply the best naming convention. Long-press for Dry Run preview.

Actions.Name: Nuke Downloads
Actions.Tooltip: Sort files in the target folder into subfolders by type: Images, Videos, Audio, Documents, Installers, and Other.

Actions.Name: Undo Last Action
Actions.Tooltip: Revert the most recent MediaMaid rename or organization operation.
